subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and firm one! The letter thou didst write to his honour Siyyid Taqi hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت مستقیم محرری که بجناب سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید این
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant
